flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Georgia Piedmont Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Georgia Piedmont Technical College rose 35% between 2006 and 2009 (22.6% → 30.5%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Georgia Piedmont Technical College fell 23% between 2017 and 2020 ($16.5k → $12.7k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Georgia Piedmont Technical College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (52.7% → 58.2%).
